name: GetPrice
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know!"}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GetPrice is a shopping comparison website which allows customers find and compare millions of products, all in one location."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto\u00a0uses data feeds to send information to GetPrice to update your products through the shopping comparison website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a data service job"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the GetPrice Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up GetPrice:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sign up for a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://www.getprice.com.au/MerchantSignUp.aspx", "children": [{"text": "GetPrice"}]}, {"text": " account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Other", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shopping Comparison Feeds", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate GetPrice and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Getprice Account ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be provided with a Feed URL. Provide this URL to GetPrice. This is a link to a file that contains a list of your products in the required format."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can modify the Feed URL, filtering products that you don\u2019t wish to push to GetPrice. To do this, click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and click the "}, {"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab to make products, categories, pricing and other changes. Scroll down and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To make changes to the feed, simply scroll back up the top and click the "}, {"text": "Generate Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and click "}, {"text": "Download Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to review the results of your changes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
